hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then files=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(c|cpp|h|hpp)$' || true); if [ -n "$files" ]; then if ! command -v clang-format &>/dev/null; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Warning: clang-format not found, skipping C/C++ formatting"}'; else echo "$files" | xargs clang-format -i && echo "$files" | xargs git add; fi; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running clang-format on staged C/C++ files...
